description_long: This object is a straight-edged sword with a broad, flat blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade appears metallic, likely made of steel, and has a matte gray finish with no visible engravings or ornamentation. The handle is cylindrical, slightly tapered, and appears to be made of dark wood or a wood-like material, capped with a rounded pommel. A simple, polygonal guard separates the blade from the handle, providing basic hand protection. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, suggesting it is intended for practical use rather than display. The proportions and construction indicate it could be used as a training or utility sword in an urban environment.
description: A straight-edged, broad-bladed sword with a simple wooden handle and polygonal guard, finished in matte gray and brown tones. The design is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade, polygonal guard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded pommel and the narrow profile of the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the blade, guard, and handle from the other side.
description_view_3: Handle-end view showing the handle's shape and the thinness of the blade.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, slightly tapered, dark wood, rounded pommel, smooth surface
